hero.description: Whether you come for a light lunch, a romantic dinner, or a special celebration - VietFood always delivers a memorable dining experience.

quote.text: Every meal is a journey. Let VietFood take you to unforgettable culinary emotions.

chatbot.title: Store Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hi! I am Miki AI. What would you like to eat today?
chatbot.welcomeWithName: Hi {name}! I am Miki AI. What would you like to eat today?

input.aiPlaceholder: Ask Miki about dishes, ordering flow...

quickReplies.howToOrder: How do I place an order?

answers.categories: VietFood proudly serves authentic Vietnamese dishes: Traditional Pho, Hanoi Bun Cha, Fresh Spring Rolls, and savory Family Rice Sets. Check out our 'Menu' for details.
answers.howToOrder:
It's easy: 
1) Scan the QR code at your table
2) Select your favorite food and drinks
3) Click 'Place Order' to notify our kitchen
4) Our staff will serve you shortly.
answers.deliveryTime: Preparation typically takes 10-15 minutes to ensure your meal is served fresh, hot, and full of flavor.
answers.deliveryAvailable: Yes! We offer home delivery via our website. You can also select the 'Takeaway' option directly in this app.
answers.fallback: Thank you for reaching out! For immediate assistance, please press the 'Call Staff' button at your table.

errors.staffConnecting: Connecting to Staff. Please try again in a few seconds.
errors.staffOffline: Staff is offline. You can continue with Miki AI.
errors.connection: Sorry, Miki is having a connection issue. Please try again shortly.
